title: Benross Avenli 88150 Inflatable 2-Piece Deluxe Lounger With Foot Stool/Perfect Chair For Gaming, Reading & Movie Watching/Lounger Size 116 x 98 x 83cm (L x W x H)
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: DELUXE INFLATABLE LOUNGER SET – This deluxe inflatable lounger with foot stool rest has been designed for ultimate comfort with a contoured seat, plush backrest and foot stool.

PERFECT SIZE – The inflatable chair and foot rest are the perfect size to fit comfortably in kids rooms, game rooms and living rooms & conservatories. The lounger measures 116 x 98 x 83cm (L x W x H), with the foot rest measuring 55 x 29cm (W x H).

GAMING CHAIR– The deluxe inflatable chair is perfect for gaming, allowing you to get comfortable as you settle down for a long gaming session. Alternately, this chair can be used for those of you who love to read, or even those movie buffs who want to watch a blockbuster hit in supreme comfort.

EASY TO INFLATE - This chair is easy to inflate, and will be to size in less than 3 minutes with an electric pump. Once deflated, the blow-up chair folds away easily for storage and transport. For added peace of mind the chair also comes with a puncture repair patch.

AVENLI – Avenli is a premium provider of stylish and modern indoor and outdoor furniture for your home and garden. From inflatable mattresses to sofas to armchairs, Avenli has all your relaxation needs covered. Check out more Avenli products on the Benross Amazon page today.
description: From the manufacturer Inflatable 2-Piece Deluxe Lounger With Foot Stool Perfect Chair For Gaming, Reading & Movie Watching This deluxe inflatable lounger with foot stool rest will provide you the most luxurious seating area in an instant when you're looking to play on your games console, read a book, or watch a movie. The inflatable chair and foot rest are the perfect size to fit comfortably in kids rooms, game rooms and living rooms & conservatories. The lounger measures 116 x 98 x 83cm (L x W x H), with the foot rest measuring 55 x 29cm (W x H). The gaming chair and footrest inflate in a matter of minutes if used alongside an electric pump. Please note, that the pumps are sold separately from the inflatable chair. KEY FEATURES LOUNGER SIZE - 116 x 98 x 83cm (L x W x H) FOOT REST SIZE - 55 x 29cm (W x H) Inflates In Minutes Suitable For Gaming, Reading & Movie Watching Folds Away Flat For Easy Storage GAME IN COMFORT This inflatable gaming chair is great to be used in kids rooms or home offices, or wherever else you want to game. PERFECT SIZE The lounger measures 116 x 98 x 83cm (L x W x H), with the foot rest measuring 55 x 29cm (W x H). READ IN COMFORT This inflatable chair and footrest is also great to be used as a pop-up reading chair, or a comfortable seat for watching movies too!
